heading: Seal of office
label: 3502 Seal of office
text: The Director shall cause a seal of office to be made for the Central Intelligence Agency, of such design as the President shall approve, and judicial notice shall be taken thereof.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 403b of this title
Amendments2004— struck out “of Central Intelligence” after “Director”.Pub. L. 108–458
